name: Water Treatment Plant Poisoning
description: Attack tree modelling compromise of a water treatment facility to alter chemical dosing levels, based on real-world incidents like Oldsmar 2021
root_objective: Alter chemical dosing in water treatment to endanger public health

nodes.title: Alter Water Treatment Chemical Dosing
nodes.description: Compromise water treatment SCADA to change chemical dosing (chlorine, fluoride, sodium hydroxide) to dangerous levels

nodes.title: Gain Remote Access to Plant Network
nodes.description: Establish remote connectivity to the water treatment facility control network

nodes.title: Exploit Exposed TeamViewer/VNC
nodes.description: Many water utilities use TeamViewer or VNC for remote access with shared passwords (as in Oldsmar)

nodes.title: Compromise Municipal VPN
nodes.description: Exploit weak VPN credentials or unpatched VPN concentrator at the municipal utility

nodes.title: Phish Plant Operator Credentials
nodes.description: Social engineer operators via email to obtain remote access credentials

nodes.title: Access Chemical Dosing Controls
nodes.description: Navigate to the SCADA screens or PLCs that control chemical feed pumps

nodes.title: Manipulate Dosing via HMI Screen
nodes.description: Use the graphical HMI to change sodium hydroxide/chlorine setpoints like a legitimate operator

nodes.title: Send Direct Commands to Dosing PLC
nodes.description: Bypass the HMI and issue Modbus commands directly to the chemical feed controller PLC

nodes.title: Evade Detection and Safety Systems
nodes.description: Prevent automated safety shutdowns and operator detection of altered dosing

nodes.title: Modify Analyser Set Points
nodes.description: Alter water quality analyser alarm thresholds to prevent automatic shutoffs at dangerous levels

nodes.title: Disable Online Water Quality Monitoring
nodes.description: Take pH, turbidity, and chemical residual sensors offline to prevent automated alerts

nodes.title: Flat Network with No Segmentation
nodes.description: Many small water utilities have flat networks with no separation between corporate IT and OT/SCADA

nodes.title: Shared Credentials Across Operators
nodes.description: Single shared password for all operators to access the SCADA system, no individual accounts
